items.title: [BOUNTY] Red Team UTXO Implementation — Find Bugs, Earn RTC (50-200 RTC)
items.body:
## Overview

RustChain is migrating from an account-based balance model to a full UTXO (Unspent Transaction Output) model. **Phase 1+2 just landed** in [`39bf02b`](https://github.com/Scottcjn/Rustchain/commit/39bf02b).

We want adversarial eyes on this before enabling dual-write on production. Break it, get paid.

## Files to Review

All in the [`node/`](https://github.com/Scottcjn/Rustchain/tree/main/node) directory of the main Rustchain repo:

| File | Lines | Purpose |
|------|-------|---------|
| `utxo_db.py` | ~708 | Core UTXO database layer — UTXOs, transactions, mempool, Merkle roots, coin selection |
| `test_utxo_db.py` | ~421 | 29 unit tests covering the UTXO layer |
| `utxo_genesis_migration.py` | ~272 | Deterministic migration of 538 existing account balances into genesis UTXOs |
| `rustchain_v2_integrated_v2.2.1_rip200.py` | (diff) | Server integration — imports + table init behind `UTXO_DUAL_WRITE` feature flag |

## What to Look For

### Critical Vectors (200 RTC)
- **Double-spend attacks** — Can the same UTXO be consumed twice? Race conditions in `apply_transaction()`?
- **Fund creation from nothing** — Can a transaction create more RTC in outputs than exists in inputs?
- **Genesis migration tampering** — Can the migration be re-run to duplicate balances?

### High Severity (100 RTC)
- **Race conditions** — Concurrent transaction application, TOCTOU between validation and commitment
- **Conservation law bypass** — Any path where `sum(inputs) != sum(outputs) + fee`
- **Lock/unlock logic errors** — Can locked UTXOs be spent? Can spending bypass the lock check?

### Medium Severity (50 RTC)
- **Mempool DoS** — Can the mempool be flooded or manipulated to block legitimate transactions?
- **Merkle state root manipulation** — Can the state root be made to diverge between nodes?
- **Fee calculation exploits** ��� Negative fees, integer overflow in fee math, fee-free transactions that should require fees

### Low Severity (25 RTC)
- **Coin selection edge cases** — Pathological wallet states that break coin selection
- **Code quality issues** — SQL injection vectors, unchecked error paths, missing validations
- **Test coverage gaps** — Important scenarios not covered by the 29 existing tests

## How to Submit

**Option A (preferred):** Open a PR on [Scottcjn/Rustchain](https://github.com/Scottcjn/Rustchain) with a **failing test case** that demonstrates the bug. Title it `[UTXO-BUG] <description>`.

**Option B:** Open an issue on this repo with a detailed writeup including:
1. The vulnerability class
2. Steps to reproduce
3. Expected vs actual behavior
4. Suggested fix (optional but earns bonus)

## Bounty Tiers Summary

| Severity | Payout | Examples |
|----------|--------|----------|
| **Critical** | **200 RTC** | Double-spend, fund creation, genesis duplication |
| **High** | **100 RTC** | Race conditions, conservation bypass |
| **Medium** | **50 RTC** | Mempool DoS, Merkle manipulation |
| **Low** | **25 RTC** | Edge cases, code quality, test gaps |

Multiple valid findings from the same researcher will each be paid individually.

## Context

- RTC reference rate: **1 RTC = $0.10 USD**
- The UTXO layer is behind a feature flag (`UTXO_DUAL_WRITE=0` by default) — it is NOT active on the live network yet
- The existing account-based model continues to handle all production transactions
- This is a pre-production security review before we flip the switch

## Resources

- [RustChain Node Health](https://50.28.86.131/health)
- [Block Explorer](https://50.28.86.131/explorer)
- [Active Miners API](https://50.28.86.131/api/miners)

items.title: 🏭 Bounty T2: Leaderboard Gamification (Badges, Streaks, Tiers)

labels.name: tier-2
labels.description: Tier 2: Open race — requires 4+ merged T1 bounties to access

items.body:
## Bounty: Leaderboard Gamification (Badges, Streaks, Tiers)
**Reward:** 500K $FNDRY | **Tier:** T2 | **Domain:** Frontend

### Description
Implement gamification features including contributor badges (gold/silver/bronze), contribution streaks with animations, and tier indicators showing mastery levels.

### Acceptance Criteria
- Badge system with multiple achievement types
- Streak tracking with visual indicators
- Tier progression system visible on leaderboard

items.title: 🏭 Bounty T2: GitHub Issue Scraper for Foundry Bounties

labels.name: tier-2
labels.description: Tier 2: Open race — requires 4+ merged T1 bounties to access

items.body:
## Bounty: GitHub Issue Scraper for Foundry Bounties
**Reward:** 600K $FNDRY | **Tier:** T2 | **Domain:** Backend

### Description
Build a backend service that automatically scrapes GitHub issues from configured repositories and posts them as SolFoundry bounties with appropriate reward tiers.

### Acceptance Criteria
- Automatic GitHub issue detection and scraping
- Auto-posting to SolFoundry website with metadata
- Webhook support for real-time issue updates

items.title: 🏭 Bounty T2: Email Notification System for Bounty Updates

labels.name: tier-2
labels.description: Tier 2: Open race — requires 4+ merged T1 bounties to access

items.body:
## Bounty: Email Notification System for Bounty Updates
**Reward:** 400K $FNDRY | **Tier:** T2 | **Domain:** Backend

### Description
Implement email notifications that alert contributors when bounties matching their interests are posted, updated, or completed. Include digest options.

### Acceptance Criteria
- Email templates for bounty updates and status changes
- User preference management for notification frequency
- Email delivery tracking and bounce handling

items.title: 🏭 Bounty T2: Advanced Bounty Search with Filters

labels.name: tier-2
labels.description: Tier 2: Open race — requires 4+ merged T1 bounties to access

items.body:
## Bounty: Advanced Bounty Search with Filters
**Reward:** 450K $FNDRY | **Tier:** T2 | **Domain:** Frontend

### Description
Build advanced search and filtering capabilities allowing contributors to filter bounties by programming language, reward range, deadline, tier level, and domain.

### Acceptance Criteria
- Multi-select filters for language, tier, domain
- Reward range slider with price presets
- Search persistence and saved filter sets

items.title: 🏭 Bounty T2: Contributor Onboarding Wizard

labels.name: tier-2
labels.description: Tier 2: Open race — requires 4+ merged T1 bounties to access

items.body:
## Bounty: Contributor Onboarding Wizard
**Reward:** 400K $FNDRY | **Tier:** T2 | **Domain:** Frontend

### Description
Create a step-by-step onboarding wizard for new contributors that guides them through profile setup, skill selection, wallet connection, and understanding the bounty system.

### Acceptance Criteria
- Multi-step form with progress tracking
- Skill/language preference selection
- Wallet connection and verification

items.title: 🏭 Bounty T2: Build Claude Code Skill for SolFoundry Bounties

labels.name: tier-2
labels.description: Tier 2: Open race — requires 4+ merged T1 bounties to access

items.body:
## Bounty: Build Claude Code Skill for SolFoundry Bounties
**Reward:** 600K $FNDRY | **Tier:** T2 | **Domain:** Agent

### Description
Create a Claude Code skill (MCP server integration) allowing developers to create, update, and manage SolFoundry bounties directly from the Claude CLI.

### Acceptance Criteria
- CLI commands for bounty CRUD operations
- Integration with SolFoundry API
- Support for batch bounty creation from config files

items.title: 🏭 Bounty T2: Build Claude Agent for Auto-Submitting to T1 Bounties

labels.name: tier-2
labels.description: Tier 2: Open race — requires 4+ merged T1 bounties to access

items.body:
## Bounty: Build Claude Agent for Auto-Submitting to T1 Bounties
**Reward:** 700K $FNDRY | **Tier:** T2 | **Domain:** Agent

### Description
Develop an autonomous Claude agent that finds Tier-1 bounties matching its capabilities, implements the solutions, and automatically submits pull requests.

### Acceptance Criteria
- Automatic bounty discovery based on agent capabilities
- Solution implementation and testing
- Automated PR submission with proper formatting

items.title: 🏭 Bounty T2: Telegram Bot for New Bounty Notifications

labels.name: tier-2
labels.description: Tier 2: Open race — requires 4+ merged T1 bounties to access

items.body:
## Bounty: Telegram Bot for New Bounty Notifications
**Reward:** 500K $FNDRY | **Tier:** T2 | **Domain:** Integration

### Description
Build a Telegram bot that posts new bounties to a dedicated channel with filtering options. Include inline keyboard buttons for quick bounty details.

### Acceptance Criteria
- Real-time bounty posting to Telegram
- Inline buttons for bounty details and claiming
- User subscription management per bounty type

items.title: 🏭 Bounty T2: AI Bounty Description Enhancer

labels.name: tier-2
labels.description: Tier 2: Open race — requires 4+ merged T1 bounties to access

items.body:
## Bounty: AI Bounty Description Enhancer
**Reward:** 450K $FNDRY | **Tier:** T2 | **Domain:** Agent

### Description
Build an AI agent that analyzes vague bounty descriptions and automatically generates improved versions with clearer requirements, acceptance criteria, and examples.

### Acceptance Criteria
- Multi-LLM analysis (Claude, Codex, Gemini)
- Automatic description enhancement
- Maintainer approval workflow before publishing

items.title: 🏭 Bounty T2: 60-Second Explainer Video: What is SolFoundry?

labels.name: tier-2
labels.description: Tier 2: Open race — requires 4+ merged T1 bounties to access

items.body:
## Bounty: 60-Second Explainer Video: What is SolFoundry?
**Reward:** 600K $FNDRY | **Tier:** T2 | **Domain:** Creative

### Description
Produce a professional 60-second animated explainer video with voiceover introducing SolFoundry's mission, how bounties work, and why developers should participate.

### Acceptance Criteria
- Professional animation and voiceover
- Brand-aligned design and messaging
- Deliverables: MP4 (1080p), WebM, social media cuts

items.title: 🏭 Bounty T2: Animated Landing Page Hero Background

labels.name: tier-2
labels.description: Tier 2: Open race — requires 4+ merged T1 bounties to access

items.body:
## Bounty: Animated Landing Page Hero Background
**Reward:** 500K $FNDRY | **Tier:** T2 | **Domain:** Frontend, Creative

### Description
Create an animated background for the landing page hero section featuring a forge/factory theme with moving elements, sparks, and molten effects that fit the SolFoundry branding.

### Acceptance Criteria
- Smooth animations at 60fps on modern browsers
- Responsive to different screen sizes
- Minimal performance impact (< 30MB bundle size)

items.title: 🏭 Bounty T2: Interactive Bounty Flow Diagram Component

labels.name: tier-2
labels.description: Tier 2: Open race — requires 4+ merged T1 bounties to access

items.body:
## Bounty: Interactive Bounty Flow Diagram Component
**Reward:** 450K $FNDRY | **Tier:** T2 | **Domain:** Frontend

### Description
Build a React component showing the bounty lifecycle flow (post → claim → work → submit → review → payment) with interactive tooltips and animations.

### Acceptance Criteria
- Interactive SVG diagram with state transitions
- Hover tooltips explaining each stage
- Responsive design for mobile and desktop

items.title: 🏭 Bounty T2: SolFoundry Brand Guide Document

labels.name: tier-2
labels.description: Tier 2: Open race — requires 4+ merged T1 bounties to access

items.body:
## Bounty: SolFoundry Brand Guide Document
**Reward:** 500K $FNDRY | **Tier:** T2 | **Domain:** Creative

### Description
Create a comprehensive brand guide document covering colors, typography, logo usage, imagery guidelines, tone of voice, and design principles for consistent branding.

### Acceptance Criteria
- Color palette with hex codes and usage rules
- Typography specifications with font families
- Logo variations, clearspace, and do's/don'ts

items.title: 🏭 Bounty T2: Discord Bot for Bounty Notifications

labels.name: tier-2
labels.description: Tier 2: Open race — requires 4+ merged T1 bounties to access

items.body:
## Bounty: Discord Bot for Bounty Notifications
**Reward:** 500K $FNDRY | **Tier:** T2 | **Domain:** Integration

### Description
Build a Discord bot that posts new bounties to a channel, displays live leaderboard rankings, and allows users to filter notifications by bounty type and reward level.

### Acceptance Criteria
- New bounty postings with rich embeds
- Leaderboard command with top contributors
- Customizable notification filters per user
